metadata.title: Del Mar Residencial – Coastal Homes & Condos Near Tijuana, Baja California
metadata.description: Del Mar Residencial offers houses and condominiums along the scenic Tijuana–Ensenada coastal corridor. A refined community with easy access to both Tijuana and Ensenada.

hero.headline: Build with confidence.
hero.subtitle: A verified and secure development for your next project.

lotExplorer.selectPrompt: Select a lot to see details

oceanLots.heading: Ocean View Lots
oceanLots.body: Explore premium ocean-view lots for sale, each offering a unique opportunity to build your dream home with stunning vistas of the Coronado Islands. Enjoy the tranquility of coastal living, where every sunrise and sunset transforms the horizon into a masterpiece.
oceanLots.bodyExtra: Our selection includes expansive lots with various square footage options to suit your vision.

ctaBanner.text: We certify so you can build your future
